steps.title: Who are you?
steps.voice_prompt: Welcome! Let's start with your name. What's your full name?

steps.title: Your business
steps.voice_prompt: Are you setting up a company, or are you a freelancer or solo user?

steps.title: Your industry
steps.voice_prompt: What industry does your business belong to?

steps.title: Team size
steps.voice_prompt: How many people are on your team?

steps.title: What you need
steps.voice_prompt: Which modules do you need? For example: sales, inventory, HR, CRM.

steps.title: Your teams
steps.voice_prompt: Tell me about your departments and roles.

steps.title: Products & services
steps.voice_prompt: What products or services do you offer?

steps.title: Data you manage
steps.voice_prompt: What kind of data do you want to manage?
